raw_source_reread_reason: The parent batch already preserved the bounded hygiene-artifact shell, the pycache shadow lineage, the pycache-versus-platform-noise split, the metadata-versus-evidence boundary, and the immediate proof-to-hygiene handoff. A later intake correction batch was sufficient to preserve the remaining closure contradiction without rereading raw source.
reasons_for_candidate_status: The hygiene batch is a real bounded closure step and remains useful as an artifact-only residue packet.
Its pycache value is reusable only if runner-name lineage stays separate from source promotion.
Its closure value is reusable only if exclusion-vs-accounting and pycache-vs-noise splits remain explicit.
Its finality claim is reusable only if it stays constrained by the later one-file coverage-correction batch.
reasons_for_quarantine: Pycache artifacts are not treated as new executable or result families.
Platform noise is not merged semantically into bytecode residue.
Integrity metadata is not promoted into simulation evidence.
The hygiene pass is not retold as universal final direct-source coverage law.
The later closure-correction batch is not erased.
